task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name and object key from an S3 URI
solution_criteria: Must include a regex pattern that captures the bucket name and object key from URIs in the format s3://bucket-name/path/to/object

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that specifies runtime, memory, timeout, and environment variables
solution_criteria: Must include valid JSON structure with properties for runtime (python3.11), memory (128-10240 MB range), timeout in seconds, and an environment variables object

task: Write a Python function to validate AWS IAM role ARN format and extract the role name
solution_criteria: Must include a function that validates ARN format using regex or string parsing, extracts and returns the role name, and handles invalid ARN inputs
